title: Conflict Handling Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger conflict handling foundations judgment so leadership / people work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Conflict Handling Foundations is a leverage point inside leadership / people. It supports the broader goal of hiring, delegation, culture, management, and communication.
coreConcepts: Conflict Handling Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good conflict handling foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Conflict Handling Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
